description: The VFSFile Class describes a virtual file contained within a Virtual File System.To access a virtual file in any operator's file parameter, use the virtual path as described below in the `virtualPath` member.

members.name: name
members.description: Get or set the name of the file. This name can include slashes but should not include leading slashes.

members.name: size
members.description: Get the size of the file data.

members.name: date
members.description: Get the modified date of the file in the form of a datetime Python object.

members.name: virtualPath
members.description: Get the virtual path of the file. Returns a String formatted for fetching the file data from VFS in operators such as the Movie File In TOP. Format is vfs::.

members.name: originalFilePath
members.description: Get the original file path on disk. If the VFSFile was created from a bytearray and not a file on disk then this will be empty.

members.name: byteArray
members.description: Get or set the file data as a bytearray.

methods.name: destroy
methods.description: Destroys the file in VFS referenced by this object.

methods.name: export
methods.description: Exports the file to the specified folder on disk and returns the location. *folder - The folder on disk to export the file to.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the VFSFile Class wiki page
